ideas.title: MOONSHOT: Cmd-K command palette (fuzzy nav, search, run blog-logic live)
ideas.why: the site has grown to many tabs (~/factory vitals, playground, widgets) with no unified entry point, and the 100%-tested blog-logic fns are only reachable via bespoke UI — a Cmd-K palette gives power-user navigation, post search, and live fn invocation in one surface.

ideas.title: Route idea-engine + news-curation inference to idle Spark GPUs
ideas.why: router shows cloud_hard=40 vs spark_today=1 while both GB10 nodes sit at util 0/temp ~45C — the factory is paying for cloud tokens next to two idle local GPUs.

ideas.title: Weekly 'AI news digest' auto-essay series from the curated feed
ideas.why: the curation pipeline already ingests AI news daily but that signal evaporates into LinkedIn posts — batching it into a dated weekly essay turns throwaway curation into a recurring content series that compounds SEO.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: 3D force-directed knowledge graph of posts & topics (WebGL)
ideas.why: the crate/site already models astronomy math and a WASM playground but has no way to SEE how 153-commits-worth of content interconnects — a spinning, clickable WebGL graph of posts→tags→concepts is a genuine 'whoa' showpiece that doubles as navigation.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: 'Ask my blog' RAG chat powered by the idle Spark GPUs
ideas.why: two GB10 nodes report util 0 with 100GB+ RAM already resident (models loaded) while the router avoids them — a browser chat panel that queries the post corpus via a Spark inference endpoint turns idle silicon into a headline capability.

ideas.title: Idea-engine dedup memory (skip already-proposed/declined items)
ideas.why: needs-review.md shows day_length_delta proposed twice and wind_dir_compass/reduced-motion still pending — the engine re-surfaces items it already flagged because it never diffs against logs/needs-review.md + logs/summary.md.
